params.name: Bacio di Giuda
params.description:
On Feb 11, 1305 AD, Giotto created Bacio di Giuda at the Scrovegni Chapel.
Bacio di Giuda is one of the representative works of Giotto, who is known as the father of European painting. The painting depicts the story of Judas' betrayal of Jesus, where he identifies Jesus to the authorities by kissing him. The figures in the painting are vivid and lifelike, breaking away from the rigid feeling of the Middle Ages. The achievements in the levels of the painting and perspective shown in the artwor …
